name: qat_int6
why: STE fake int6 quantization in the forward pass teaches the model to survive 6-bit compression. Straight-through estimator passes gradients unchanged. Reduces quant gap from ~0.015 to ~0.002. Widely adopted across top submissions.
validates: Quant gap shrinks significantly; post-quant BPB improves even if pre-quant is slightly worse.
falsifies: QAT hurts pre-quant quality too much to recover at export.
notes: QAT makes pre-quant val_bpb WORSE (model trains with noise). The win is in post-quant.
Kill rule: if pre-quant val_bpb worse by >0.01, the gap is too large to recover.
Promote rule: if pre-quant within 0.005 of control (gap recovers at export).
